title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Balloons, Foil balloons for Helium, Birthday Decoration for Girls and Boys, Suitable for Helium or Air, Resistant Material, 46cm, 1 Unit
features: Birthday balloons: these balloons are the perfect highlight for any children's birthday. With their colourful design, they immediately attract everyone's attention and create a festive atmosphere.
Helloder or air: our balloons can be filled with both helium and air. This makes it flexible – whether you want to float it or attach it to the wall.
Very durable material: made of high-quality foil material, the balloons are robust and reusable. Not cheap plastic - but durable quality that still convinces even after the party.
Original design: each balloon is printed with an official licensed motif. Ideal for little fans who don't want to miss their favourite characters at their own celebration.
Matching party set: discover other products in matching designs in our shop – from garlands to table decorations to invitation cards. Everything perfectly matched.
description: Product Description Bring life to the birthday party - with your favourite characters! The perfect children's birthday decoration starts with what catches the most eye: the balloons. Our birthday foil balloons (46 cm) transform any room into a colourful, cheerful and stylish party paradise. Discover our unique collection of officially licensed birthday balloons - lovingly designed for unforgettable experiences with small (and large) birthday children. Perfect for themed parties, as a helium gift or simply to add an extra dose of joy to any angle. Next page 1 Paw Patrol 2 sonic 3 Plim Plim 4 Pocoyo 5 Skye Our balloons are made to stand out at any celebration. With officially licensed design, they offer quality, safety and authentic favourite characters. They can be easily filled with air or helium - perfect for floating, as part of a garland or for creative background decorations. Made from durable foil material, they are durable and ideal for all kinds of parties. Whether as an eye-catcher on the sweet table, at chairs, in the entrance area or as an original gift idea - these balloons will add enthusiasm. Ideal for children's birthdays, theme parties, school parties or as personalised helium balloons. Available in many popular designs such as: Hot Wheels, Plim Plim, Doraemon, Monster High, Paw Patrol (PAW Patrol), The Smurfs, Heidi, My Little Pony, Sonic, Peppa Pig, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles, Garfield, SpongeBob Squarepants, Pocoyo, Skye and Barbie - we have the perfect balloon for any fan and party!
